title: Bedsheets
description: Customize your bed by adding a banner pattern to the sheets!
body:
Bedsheets is a datapack (also available as a mod) to allow players more customization of their beds!

You can apply a banner by dropping it on top of a bed block, it will then attach to the block after displaying green particles for a moment. The banner can be removed by breaking the bed and placing it again. This datapack is designed to not interfere with the bed or banner block's other functionality, and is purely cosmetic.

There is a minor issue with the banner unrendering when the foot of the bed isn't in view,  even when the top of the bed is in view. This is unavoidable due to how this datapack displays the banners, however this will soon not be an issue for Minecraft 1.19.4+ as long as the correct version of the datapack is used.

After you remove all beds with banners, this pack is safe to remove after it has been installed on your world.
If you experience issues, please join my discord server and message me about it and I'll get back to you ASAP.
